title: Methods for enhancing antigen-specific immune responses using combination therapy comprising papillomavirus capsid antigens
abstract: Described herein are methods comprising co-administering to a mammalian an effective amount of a combination therapy comprising at least one DNA vector comprising a papillomavirus capsid antigen and at least one DNA vaccine comprising an antigenic peptide, to thereby enhancing an antigen specific immune response.
claims: Claims 1. A combination for use in inducing or enhancing an antigen-specific immune response in a mammal, comprising (a) an effective amount of at least one DNA vector comprising a papillomavirus capsid antigen to be administered; (b) an effective amount of at least one DNA vaccine comprising an antigenic peptide to be administered, and the combination induces or enhances the antigen specific immune response. 2. The combination of claim 1, wherein the papillomavirus is selected from the group consisting of human papilloma virus (HPV)l, HPV2, HPV3, HPV4, HPV5, HPV6, HPV7, HPV8, HPV9, HPV10, HPV11, HPV12, HPV13, HPV14, HPV15, HPV16, HPV17, HPV18, HPV19, HPV20, HPV21, HPV22, HPV23, HPV24, HPV25, HPV26, HPV27, HPV28, HPV29, HPV30, HPV31, HPV32, HPV33, HPV34, HPV35, HPV36, HPV37, HPV38, HPV39, HPV40, HPV41, HPV42, HPV43, HPV44, HPV45, HPV46, HPV47, HPV48, HPV49, HPV50, HPV51, HPV52, HPV53, 1-IPV54, HPV55, HPV56, HPV57, HPV58, HPV59, HPV60, HPV61, HPV62, HPV63, HPV64, HPV65, HPV66, HPV67, HPV68, HPV69, HPV70, HPV71, HPV72, HPV73, HPV74, HPV75, HPV76, HPV77, HPV78, HPV79, HPV80, HPV81, HPV82, HPV83, HPV84, HPV85, HPV86, HPV87, HPV88, HPV89, HPV90, HPV91, HPV92, HPV93, HPV94, HPV95, HPV96, HPV97, HPV98, HPV99, HPV100, bovine papillomavirus type 1 (BPV1), bovine papillomavirus type 2 (BPV2), bovine papillomavirus type 4 (BPV4), cottontail rabbit papillomavirus (CRPV), deer papillomavirus (DPV), European elk papillomavirus (EEPV), canine oral papillomavirus (COPY), Rhesus monkey papillomavirus (RnPV), and rabbit oral papillomavirus (ROPV). 3. The combination of claim 2, wherein the papillomavirus is bovine papillomavirus type 1 (BPV1). 4. The combination of claim 1, wherein the capsid antigen is a major and minor capsid antigen. 5. The combination of claims 4, wherein the major capsid antigen is LI . 6. The combination of claim 4, wherein the minor capsid antigen is L2. 7. The combination of claim 5, wherein the capsid antigen LI is derived from BPV1, and said capsid antigen comprises an amino acid sequence at least 60% identical to the amino acid sequence set forth in SEQ ID NO: 123. 8. The combination of claim 6, wherein the capsid antigen L2 is derived from BPV1, and said capsid antigen comprises an amino acid sequence at least 60% identical to the amino acid sequence set forth in SEQ ID NO: 125. 9. The combination of claim 1, wherein the combination elicits enhanced antigen- specific CD8 + . 10. The combination of claim 1, wherein the DNA vaccine comprises an antigenic peptide, and said antigenic peptide is selected from the group consisting of ovalbumin (OVA), HPV16 E6, HPV16 E7, and influenza NS1. 11. The combination of claim 10, wherein the DNA vaccine comprises HPV-16 E7 (E7) antigen linked with calreticulum (CRT) (CRT/E7). 12. The combination of claim 11, wherein the E7 comprises an amino acid sequence set forth in RAHYNIVTF. 13. The combination of claim 10, wherein the DNA vaccine comprises OVA. 14. The combination of claim 13, wherein the OVA comprises an amino acid sequence set forth in ISQAVHAAHAEINEAGR. 15. The combination of claim 2, wherein the papillomavirus is human papillomavirus type 16 (HPV-16). 16. The combination of claims 15, wherein the major capsid antigen is LI . 17. The combination of claim 15, wherein the minor capsid antigen is L2. 18. The combination of claim 16, wherein the capsid antigen LI is derived from HPV16, and said capsid antigen comprises an amino acid sequence at least 60% identical to the amino acid sequence set forth in SEQ ID NO: 119. 19. The combination of claim 17, wherein the capsid antigen L2 is derived from HPV16, and said capsid antigen comprises an amino acid sequence at least 60% identical to the amino acid sequence set forth in SEQ ID NO: 121. 20. The combination of claim 1, wherein the combination elicits enhanced antigen- specific CD4 + T cell immune response. 21. The combination of claim 1, wherein the enhanced antigen-specific CD4 + T cell immune response is L1-, L2-, or Ll/L2-specific. 22. The combination of claim 1, wherein the mammal is a human. 23. The combination of claim 1, wherein the mammal is afflicted with cancer. 24. The combination of claim 1, wherein the combination is administered intradermally, intraperitoneally, or intravenously via injection. 25. The combination of claim 1, wherein the combination is administered alone or in a pharmaceutically acceptable carrier in a biologically-effective, and/or a therapeutically- effective amount, 26. The combination of claim 1, wherein the antigen-specific immune response is greater in magnitude than an antigen-specific immune response induced by administration of the DNA vaccine or DNA vector alone.
